description: **Honor paths.features in .compose/compose.json across all writers.** feature-writer.js (addRoadmapEntry/setFeatureStatus/linkFeatures), feature-json.js (readFeature/writeFeature/listFeatures), and ArtifactManager all default to docs/features and ignore the configured override. Threading the override through every writer + ArtifactManager constructor unblocks repos that need a non-default feature root.
